/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(B), A SPLIT SENTENCE/AJW/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/DEF:IS SENTENCED ON COUNT TWO TO 16 MONTHS, THE LOW TERM/STATES//X:TOTAL 16 MONTHS/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(B), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ 8M/CTS:116/4019HALF/MANSUP:8 MONTHS/MANSUPCTS:232/MANSUP1/WS/COA:40/ICNA/VF4:300/COLLECT/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 2, PC459, A FELONY IN THE SECOND DEGREE, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 06-06-19/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL: STATUS OF PROGRAM/DAWT/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO BE RELEASED TO ACMFOR TRANSPORT ONLY TO ENTER RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM DIRECTLY FROM IN-CUSTODY WHEN A BED IS AVAILABLE,  CHECK IN WITH ACM 5 TIMES PER WEEK VIA PHONE,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/STWPX/X: DEFENDANT IS REFERRED TO ACM FOR TRANSPORT TO FATHER ALFRED'S CENTER/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE PRIOR TO TRANSPORT AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP FOR TRANSPORT TO FATHER ALFRED'S CENTER WHEN A BED IS AVAILABLE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1: JEREMY ALLEN/SA2: WELLS FARGO AT 101 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF PROGRAM/DOP/
